security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https:; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; script-src 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: Local VeriLock seal verifier — file never leaves your device
bundle.longDescription: Open-source offline verifier for VeriLock document seals. Hash files locally and verify against Nimiq lock transactions without uploading the document.
